description: Canonical Phase 0 companion-spike loop: a broken-chord guitar arpeggio with a descending bass and Gadd4 ending color.
intentional_omissions: The bass descent skips Ab before landing on G.
reject_if: the output is a static pad that does not track the chord or bass movement
the output misses the C to B to Bb to A to G bass motion
the output collapses the ending color into plain G with no added-4th feel
the output adds drums or a lead melody
the output is too dense or overpowers the guitar role
the model cannot generate one usable cycle in less than the cycle duration
